name: BrepLoopType
summary: Each brep loop has a defined type, e.g. outer, inner or point on surface.

enum_values.name: Outer
enum_values.summary: 2d loop curves form a simple closed curve with a counterclockwise orientation.

enum_values.name: Inner
enum_values.summary: 2d loop curves form a simple closed curve with a clockwise orientation.

enum_values.name: Slit
enum_values.summary: Always closed - used internally during splitting operations.

enum_values.name: CurveOnSurface
enum_values.summary: "loop" is a curve-on-surface made from a single (open or closed) trim that has type TrimType.CurveOnSurface.

enum_values.name: PointOnSurface
enum_values.summary: "loop" is a PointOnSurface made from a single trim that has type TrimType.PointOnSurface.
